rules: Requires explicit cost line.
Can be placed on burst during legal priority windows.
If text says target, legal target must exist.
If no target text, effect resolves without target selection.
Cost must be payable at activation time.
If ability line says once per turn, it cannot be used again in same turn.
Activation cost is paid first.
Then chosen effects are queued/resolved according to stack windows.
No additive stacking semantics by default; resolved as independent stack items.
Duration comes from each resolved effect.
Usage lock for once-per-turn resets at next turn.

exceptions: Cards with multiple activation lines are tracked per line.
examples: MC: Heal 5 damage to target Creature.
Deal 10 damage to a Creature you control: that Creature gains Swift 2. This ability can only be used once per turn.

rules: Evaluated when linked attack effect resolves.

target_rule.summary: Engaged opposing creature or target from effect
rules: Default challenge compares engaged attacker and defender.
Controller stat must be >= opposing stat + X.
If challenge succeeds, linked amount/effect applies.
If challenge fails, linked amount/effect does not apply.
Independent challenge clauses on same attack resolve independently.
No persistent state unless explicitly granted by a linked effect.

exceptions: Auto-success rules can override challenge check where card text says so.

rules: Triggered when adjacent ally is chosen to be attacked.
Redirect unit must be adjacent and satisfy defender criteria.
Criteria variants (e.g. tribe/element) restrict legal redirects.
Defender swaps in and becomes engaged defender for current combat.
Multiple defender instances remain redundant except criteria union.
Applied to current defender selection event.

exceptions: No redirect if no legal adjacent defender exists.

rules: Applies to matching elemental attack damage only.
Creature source usually self.
Gear source usually equipped creature.
Bonus applies only when attack has same element.

exact_rule.summary: Increase elemental attack damage by X
rules: Adds X for each applicable instance.
Multiple element modifiers stack additively.
Ends when source effect expires.

exceptions: Suppressed elements prevent bonus from applying.
examples: Air attacks deal an additional 5 damage.

rules: Checks opposing engaged creature elements when combat starts.
Energy gain is applied to elementproof holder.

condition_rule.summary: Element match with opposing engaged creature
rules: At least one matching listed element required.
Adds configured energy amount on successful trigger.
Different elementproof clauses may stack.
Energy bonus lasts per current combat/turn rules of effect source.

exceptions: No trigger if creature never becomes engaged.

timing.summary: Triggered or direct resolution depending on source
rules: Can resolve from mugic, attacks, or triggered abilities.
Can require uninfected or infected target according to source text.
Existing infection blocks duplicate application unless removed first.
Marks target as infected for downstream synergies.
Infection is binary in current implementation.
Removed on explicit uninfect effect or discard/reset.

exceptions: Outdated parasite-as-mandiblor rule is not used.
examples: Infect up to two target Uninfected Creatures.
